conjecture: A prospectively frozen evidence-integrity layer plus a deterministic arrival benchmark will eliminate the four known self-certification gaps and will survive repeated positive, injected-negative, and recovery controls without replacing ooptdd's three-valued verdict kernel.
registration_mechanism: git commit in gj3447/lakatotree before candidate implementation and candidate measurement
prior_measurement_boundary: All ooptdd trajectory measurements at or before git head 53e646a7756325f4050819d7e00add87988fca4a are exploratory or regression evidence only. They carry no confirmatory novelty weight in this programme.

guards: trajectory-only mutation report derives at least one eligible mutant and never reports a vacuous perfect as measured evidence
evidence construction recomputes every aggregate from raw observations and rejects a forged summary
evidence construction enforces preregistered candidate head, baseline head, and specification hash
the real DeepEval held-out artifact is asserted in CI and an injected mismatch makes that assertion fail

required_scenarios: silent evidence loss becomes absent, never green
ingestion inside the declared blind window does not become a false red
a late forbidden event is caught with confirm_rounds=1 and missed by the zero-round control
an unreachable store stays inconclusive and never renders as a JUnit failure
trajectory mutation has a non-zero eligible denominator and kills every frozen mutant
dependent-store evidence is demoted while a distinct external probe reaches external_verdict

negative_controls: forge a top-level aggregate while leaving raw observations unchanged
substitute an unregistered source head or specification hash
inject a forbidden tool name, forbidden argument shape, corrupt arguments, omitted required call, reordered dependency, and exact-mode extra call
flip one DeepEval probe's expected match
run a negative control, then rerun the unchanged positive control and bind both in chronological order
kill_condition: Reject the conjecture if any integrity guard remains open, any required Tier-0 scenario has oracle_match=false in any of 20 repetitions, the trajectory mutation denominator is zero, the injected negative does not fail, the restored positive does not pass, source/spec bindings are not enforced, or a report serializes inconclusive as success/failure instead of infrastructure uncertainty.
honesty_boundaries: Tier 0 proves deterministic gate mechanics, not external arrival.
A real OpenObserve Tier 1 run is required before claiming store-level arrival efficacy.
DeepEval and Phoenix remain integration surfaces; no generic LLM judge is part of the ooptdd kernel.
The legacy 27-case battery remains regression evidence; it is not relabeled held-out or prospective.
